student_profiles.interests: I want a high paying tech job building software, focusing heavily on automation and predictive artificial intelligence modeling.
I want to study corporate scaling, financial analysis, and starting global businesses or marketing campaigns.
I am deeply passionate about computers, coding, and algorithms, but I am definitely planning on taking a gap year travel before I start my studies.
I need a university with a huge social scene, parties, and vibrant student life. I want to study business or management.
I'm looking for a technical software degree, but campus sports culture is everything to me. I need elite training facilities and gym access.
I plan to work full-time while studying, so I need a corporate program that offers flexible schedules or evening networking.
Data engineering and heavy mathematical coding are what I want, but I have extreme social anxiety and prefer a quiet, low-key campus atmosphere.
International trade, economics, and learning how to scale global operations. I also want to play competitive soccer at the university level.
I want to learn public speaking, human communication frameworks, and rhetoric, but my main focus is finding a highly collaborative environment.
Speech pathology, audio systems, and communication disorders. I want a fast-paced medical research environment.
